# SheetJS Community Edition 0.20.3

This directory retains the exact SheetJS Community Edition 0.20.3 distribution artifact used by BIMLog.

- Upstream artifact: `xlsx-0.20.3.tgz`
- Official source: <https://cdn.sheetjs.com/xlsx-0.20.3/xlsx-0.20.3.tgz>
- SHA-256: `8dc73fc3b00203e72d176e85b50938627c7b086e607c682e8d3c22c02bb99fe8`
- Package name/version: `xlsx@0.20.3`
- License: Apache-2.0
- Official repository: <https://git.sheetjs.com/SheetJS/sheetjs>

The distribution contains the Apache-2.0 license at `package/LICENSE` and `package/dist/LICENSE`. Preserve the license and applicable copyright, patent, trademark, and attribution notices when redistributing the package.

The artifact was independently inspected before vendoring. It contains no install lifecycle hooks, native binaries, symlinks, absolute paths, or parent-directory traversal entries. Do not replace it without repeating the dependency provenance, archive safety, license, integrity, lockfile, and compatibility review.
